nation: Moravian Of The Thames First Nation
economic_notes: Nation controls 100% of Naahii Inc. (commercial real estate), Naahii Grocery Store Inc. (currently inactive grocery store), and Lunaapeew Developments LP (gas station and Tim Hortons). These are accounted for under modified equity method but do not meet GBE/GBP criteria — constitutes PSAS departure. Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership (OFNLP) gaming revenue also recorded.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED for two reasons: (1) tangible capital assets acquired prior to 1998 not capitalized; (2) Naahii Inc., Naahii Grocery Store Inc., and Lunaapeew Developments LP are accounted for under modified equity method but do not meet GBE/GBP criteria and should be fully consolidated — auditors could not audit these entities. No schedule of remuneration disclosed. Revenue total of $11,224,116 is net of deferred revenue movements and repayable to funding source adjustments. ISC funding calculated as sum of ISC-Fixed + ISC-Flexible + ISC-Set + ISC-Grant = $4,044,302. Total government transfers estimated from segmented revenue totals for ISC, Health Canada, AIAI, Stepping Stones, Provincial, Ministry of Education, MOHLTC, SFNS, CMHC, OFNLP = $10,133,271. OSR includes rental, admin fees, and other revenue lines. current_liabilities includes accounts payable $720,670 + payable to funding source $654,339 + deposits on hand $11,417 + current portion of LTD $113,480 less deposits = $1,386,426 approximate.
